local_axes.Y: front-back; +Y points from PCB interior toward enclosure edge and actuator tip

electrical_pads.derivation: pad X gap 2.8, each width 0.6; Y spans 0.86 to 1.80 from hole centreline, so height 0.94; footprint Y is mirrored so outward actuation is +Y

evidence.side_view_datum_interpretation: 0.66 and horizontal 0.85 terminate on internal/contact datums in the side view. They are not travel, Z height, or a uniquely dimensioned external stem projection, so the simple external envelope does not use them as such.
evidence.local_press_direction: -Y; travel is translation along Y only
evidence.circuit: pin 1 normally open to pin 2; closes when pressed

limits: The PDF provides a recommended land pattern but no named copper keepout; the body maximum envelope is documented on Fab/Courtyard, not asserted as a manufacturer copper keepout.
The central 1.54 mm hatched land is treated as an unnumbered mechanical solder land because the circuit diagram has only pins 1 and 2.
STEP is a simple nominal envelope, not the vendor production model; it uses H=3.5 as total Y and never as Z.
